picks.quote: I was in favor of Max moving up to 155 even before he did... I think he's going to be good in this weight class
the fact that Dan Eay was like a two and a half to one favorite over Patricio Pitbull, I was like, dang, that's crazy to me
it was fun to watch, man, because Michael Johnson is a very nice guy... was happy to see him get the win.
I said before the fight that if Manny, you know, wins four rounds, they'll figure out a way to to give him the fight.
Sebastian Fondora is evolving into a real big problem... if he keeps going down this road, he might be like the true class of this division.
I'd love to see that fight [against Lamont Roach].
